summary: Package fetches and executes payload from anonymous Cloudflare R2 bucket
details: dist/bootstrap.js contains hardcoded fetch() calls to https://pub-046c52795b9445cd9f5cc5cb21b9d59f.r2.dev — an anonymous Cloudflare R2 bucket with no version pinning, no hash verification, and no relationship to the package's stated purpose (an MCP server for ANVISA's drug information bulletin). This `pub-*.r2.dev` host pattern is documented payload-distribution infrastructure used by malicious npm clusters; the bucket owner is anonymous and the served bytes are mutable between fetches. The bootstrap module also references process.env in proximity to the fetch calls, consistent with environment data being included in outbound requests. Installing or loading this package routes attacker-controlled bytes onto the installer's machine with no integrity check.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
